things.name: Walk the Old City Walls
things.description: 2-km medieval ramparts surrounding the UNESCO pearl of the Adriatic — unmissable views over the sea

things.name: Stradun (Placa)
things.description: The gleaming marble main street of the old town — Dubrovnik's social hub since the 13th century

things.name: Lokrum Island
things.description: Lush nature reserve island 10 minutes by ferry with a botanical garden, peacocks and a Dead Sea lake

things.name: Mount Srd Cable Car
things.description: Gondola ride to 412 metres above the old town for the most spectacular panoramic views of Dubrovnik

things.name: Rector's Palace
things.description: Gothic-Renaissance palace that was the seat of the Rector of the Dubrovnik Republic, now a museum

things.name: Dominican Monastery & Museum
things.description: Magnificent 14th-century cloister with important artworks by Dubrovnik masters and a library

things.name: Game of Thrones Tour
things.description: Walk the filming locations of King's Landing — Fort Lovrijenac, the old town gates and harbour

things.name: Banje Beach
things.description: The most scenic beach in Croatia — pebble shore just outside the old town with views of the walls

things.name: Elaphiti Islands Boat Tour
things.description: Day cruise to the three relaxed car-free Elaphiti islands of Kolocep, Lopud and Sipan

things.name: War Photo Limited
things.description: Powerful gallery of documentary war photography including extensive coverage of the 1991-95 conflict
